page_metadata.biotools__summary: A pipeline for automated configuration and processing of diffusion MRI data. iDIO is a software toolkit for processing diffusion-weighted MRI data. It integrates the functionalities of modern MRI software packages to constitute a complete data processing pipeline for structural connectivity analysis of the human brain.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A pipeline for automated configuration and processing of diffusion MRI data. iDIO is a software toolkit for processing diffusion-weighted MRI data.
